message:
chore: rustfmt postgres test + sync beads ledger

Two unrelated chores grouped together because each is too small to
deserve its own commit:

- `src/packs/database/postgresql.rs`: Collapse the multi-line
  `assert_no_match` call in `truncate_pattern_requires_word_boundary`
  to a single line. `cargo fmt` decided the line fit within the
  100-char column budget once the inner string literal stopped
  containing the line break that pre-fmt formatting had introduced.
  No semantic change.

- `.beads/issues.jsonl`: Routine `br sync --flush-only` export
  reflecting the bead status updates produced by the security
  hardening landed earlier in this session (allowlist boundary
  checks, hot-path panic bounds, AST worker cancellation,
  hermetic test environment, install-URL pinning, interactive
  scope cancel-on-empty fix, install/uninstall basename match
  propagation). Status metadata only — no schema or dependency
  graph changes.

`.beads/.write.lock` is intentionally not staged; it is a per-process
flock coordination file regenerated on the next `br` invocation.
